instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates potential safety violations in the system"
]

    base:desc "Indicates opportunities for operational improvement"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Signals occurrence of a fault in the system"
]

    base:desc "Provides estimated system state for decision-making"
]

    base:desc "Optimal parameter settings derived from optimization algorithms"
]

    base:desc "Adjusts heatbed and fan to maintain safe operating conditions",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Assesses safety and operational optimality through real-time sensor data analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight
]

    base:desc "Detects system faults using algorithm-based analysis",

]

    base:desc "Estimates system state using predictive algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes system parameters for operational efficiency",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParametersInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides automated control adjustments based on system state",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides optimization and parameter estimation algorithms using Python Scipy package",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

]

]

]

    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
